summary: The protagonist, known as 'Alley Boss', confronts his rival Tian Hu, a streamer and scalper who has been targeting him and his guild members. Alley Boss accepts a series of increasingly difficult betting missions from viewers, including fighting with restrictions like using only a novice set or one hand. The chapter culminates in Alley Boss challenging Tian Hu to a high-stakes combat trial where the loser faces total character deletion to settle their dispute.
key_moments: Alley Boss discovers that Tian Hu hired players to ambush him and decides to hunt down members of the Isis Guild.
A mysterious 'Mission Man' viewer begins donating large sums of gold to force Alley Boss into restrictive combat challenges.
Alley Boss confronts Tian Hu in person and formalizes a duel under the condition of character deletion to prove their innocence.
